parsed.production_notes: The video features a real human presenter with natural movements, facial expressions, and speech patterns. The lighting, shadows, and background details are consistent with a standard smartphone or webcam recording in a home environment.

characters.appearance: Young adult female, slim build, fair complexion, long wavy brown hair. She has a small mole on her left cheek.
characters.wardrobe: Black cardigan worn over a white collared shirt.

scenes.setting: A bedroom with a poster board on the wall. Warm, slightly dim lighting.

panels.panel_visual_description: Character A is speaking directly to the camera. She has long wavy brown hair and is wearing a black cardigan over a white collared shirt. She is actively gesturing with her hands, holding up fingers to count as she speaks. Behind her is a white wall decorated with a collage of various posters and photos. The lighting in the room is warm and slightly dim, creating a cozy atmosphere.

scenes.visual_description: The presenter is talking to the camera, counting her achievements on her fingers. Various photos and text overlays appear on screen to illustrate her points, such as her as an exchange student, an interview, and an internship.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character A says: 제가 영어 덕분에 [Thanks to English,]
Character A says: 인생이 바뀐 순간이 [the moments my life changed]
Character A says: 있었거든요 [were there.]
Character A says: 1번. 미국 & 프랑스 교환학생 [Number 1. US & France exchange student.]
Character A says: 2번. 구겐하임 미술관 단독 인터뷰 [Number 2. Guggenheim Museum exclusive interview.]
Character A says: 3번. 글로벌 뷰티 마케팅 인턴! [Number 3. Global beauty marketing intern!]
Character A says: 이거 세 개 다 [All three of these]
Character A says: 영어 스피킹 자격증 & 영어 면접 필수인 거 아시죠? [you know English speaking certification & English interview are mandatory, right?]
Character A says: 지나고 보니까 [Looking back,]
Character A says: 영어를 못 했다면? [if I couldn't speak English?]
Character A says: 기회를 못 잡았을 것 같은 거예요. [I wouldn't have been able to grab the opportunities.]
Character A says: 그런 제가 지금까지도 [Even now, I]
Character A says: 꾸준히 하고 있는 게 [am consistently doing]
scenes.on_screen_text:
[스픽 최저가 링크 & 무료 영어 스터디 신청폼 공유] ([Speak lowest price link & free English study application form shared])
[인생 전환점] 바뀐 순간이 ([Life turning point] The moment it changed)
1번. [토익 975, 오픽 AL, 토플 100점 이상] 미국 & 프랑스 교환학생 (Number 1. [TOEIC 975, OPIc AL, TOEFL 100+] US & France exchange student)
2번. 구겐하임 미술관 단독 인터뷰 (Number 2. Guggenheim Museum exclusive interview)
3번. [토익 975, 오픽 AL, 토플 100점 이상] 글로벌 뷰티 마케팅 인턴! (Number 3. [TOEIC 975, OPIc AL, TOEFL 100+] Global beauty marketing intern!)
이거 세 개 다 영어 스피킹 자격증 & 영어 면접 필수인 거 아시죠? (All three of these require English speaking certification & English interview, you know?)
지나고 보니까 영어를 못 했다면? 기회를 못 잡았을 것 (Looking back, if I couldn't speak English? Wouldn't have grabbed the opportunities)
[영어 공부 방법 공개] 그런 제가 지금까지도 꾸준히 하고 있는 게 ([English study method revealed] What I am consistently doing even now)

scenes.setting: A bedroom with a poster board on the wall. Warm, slightly dim lighting.

panels.panel_visual_description: Character A continues to speak to the camera, using hand gestures to emphasize her words. She is wearing the same black cardigan and white collared shirt. The background remains the white wall with the poster collage. The warm lighting is consistent.

scenes.visual_description: The presenter continues talking. A screencast of the 'Speak' app is overlaid on the video, showing the app interface and an AI character. She also shows a clip of herself using the app on her phone.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character A says: 바로 스픽의 정규 수업입니다. [is exactly Speak's regular class.]
Character A says: 이번에는 스픽 AI 프리톡 업그레이드가 [This time, Speak AI free talk upgrade]
Character A says: 진짜 괜찮더라고요. [is really good.]
Character A says: 프리톡 탭에서 [In the free talk tab,]
Character A says: 캐릭터를 선택하고 [select a character and]
Character A says: 원하는 상황에 나만의 레슨을 만드는 [create your own lesson for the situation you want]
Character A says: 그런 서비스예요. [It's that kind of service.]
scenes.on_screen_text:
스픽 진심녀의.. (Speak sincere woman's..)
(실제로 이렇게 쓰고 있어요) ((Actually using it like this))
이번에는 AI 프리톡 기능! 진짜 괜찮더라고요 (This time AI free talk feature! It's really good)
프리톡 탭에서 캐릭터를 선택하고 (Select a character in the free talk tab and)
제가 원하는 상황에 <나만의 레슨>을 만드는 그런 서비스예요 (It's a service where I create <my own lesson> for the situation I want)

scenes.setting: A bedroom with a poster board on the wall. Warm, slightly dim lighting.

panels.panel_visual_description: Character A is speaking to the camera, using hand gestures to explain her points. She is dressed in the black cardigan and white collared shirt. The background is the white wall with posters. The lighting is warm and slightly dim.

scenes.visual_description: The presenter explains the benefits for beginners. A funny distorted filter is briefly applied to her face. Then, screencasts of the app's AI chat interface are overlaid, showing real-time hints and corrections. An audio clip of the AI voice is played.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character A says: 왕초보 분들에게도 너무 추천하는 이유가 있습니다. [There is a reason I highly recommend it to absolute beginners too.]
Character A says: 사실 영어 시작하자마자 [Actually, as soon as you start English,]
Character A says: 원어민들과의 대화를 바로 시작하기는 조금 부담스럽잖아요. [starting a conversation with native speakers right away is a bit burdensome.]
Character A says: 이 기능에서는 [In this feature,]
Character A says: 대화 중에 필요할 때마다 [whenever needed during the conversation,]
Character A says: 즉시 힌트랑 실시간 교정 기능을 사용할 수 있으니 [you can use instant hints and real-time correction features, so]
Character A says: 외국인과 대화하는 듯한 그런 경험을 할 수 있습니다. [you can have an experience like talking to a foreigner.]
Character A says: 실제 사람 같은 목소리로 [With a voice like a real person,]
Unknown speaker says: Is it dry? [Is it dry?]
Character A says: 속도감 있는 자연스러운 대화가 가능하니까 [fast-paced natural conversation is possible, so]
Character A says: 실전 투입되기 전에 [before going into actual practice,]
Character A says: 꼭 이 기능으로 연습해 보는 걸 추천합니다. [I strongly recommend practicing with this feature.]
scenes.on_screen_text:
왕초보 추천! (Highly recommended for beginners!)
영어 회화 공부 다짐하자마자 원어민들과의 대화..? (Conversation with native speakers as soon as you resolve to study English conversation..?)
그건 조금 부담스럽다ㅎㅎ;; (That's a bit burdensome haha;;)
이 기능에서는 필요할 때마다 1. 즉시 힌트 기능 2. 실시간 교정 기능을 사용할 수 있으니 (In this feature, whenever needed, you can use 1. instant hint feature 2. real-time correction feature)
대화하는 듯한 그런 경험을 할 수 있습니다 (You can have an experience like having a conversation)
+ 목소리가 실제 사람 같음! (+ Voice is like a real person!)
(AI 프리톡 목소리) ((AI free talk voice))
속도감 있는 자연스러운 대화가 가능하니까 (Fast-paced natural conversation is possible, so)
교환학생/여행 전에 꼭! 이 기능으로 연습해 보는 걸 추천합니다 (Before exchange student/travel, strongly! recommend practicing with this feature)

scenes.setting: A bedroom with a poster board on the wall. Warm, slightly dim lighting.

panels.panel_visual_description: Character A continues speaking to the camera, clasping her hands together and gesturing. She wears the black cardigan over a white collared shirt. The poster collage is visible on the white wall behind her. The lighting is warm.

scenes.visual_description: The presenter talks about the app's philosophy. Text overlays emphasize her points about dropping perfectionism and not being afraid to make mistakes.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character A says: 영어 공부한다는 친구들한테 [To friends who say they are studying English,]
Character A says: 매일 하는 말이 제발 완벽주의를 내려놓자!!! [what I say every day is please let's drop perfectionism!!!]
Character A says: 영어 할 때 틀릴까 봐 걱정되시죠? [When speaking English, you're worried about making mistakes, right?]
Character A says: 그런데 여러분 스픽 철학이 뭡니까 [But everyone, what is Speak's philosophy?]
Character A says: 틀려라, 트일 것이다 잖아요. [It's 'Make mistakes, you will open up'.]
Character A says: 영어를 잘하려면 틀려야 돼요. [To speak English well, you have to make mistakes.]
Character A says: 이런 철학의 인지도 1위 서비스라 [As it's the #1 brand awareness service with this philosophy,]
Character A says: 저는 이제 스픽 아니면 영어 공부를 못 할 것 같아요. [I don't think I can study English without Speak now.]
scenes.on_screen_text:
영어 공부한다는 친구들한테 매-일 하는 말 제발 완벽주의를 내려놓자!!! (What I say every day to friends studying English: please let's drop perfectionism!!!)
영어가 어려운 진짜 이유? "틀릴까 봐 걱정돼서" (The real reason English is hard? "Worried about making mistakes")
그런데 여러분 스픽 철학이 뭡니까 (But everyone, what is Speak's philosophy?)
틀려라, 트일 것이다 (Make mistakes, you will open up)
영어 잘하고 싶다? 틀려야 돼요. (Want to speak English well? You have to make mistakes.)
이런 스픽의 철학 + 인지도 1위 (This philosophy of Speak + #1 brand awareness)
난 이제 스픽 없는 영어 공부? 상상 안됨.. (Me studying English without Speak now? Can't imagine..)

scenes.scene_label: Study Group and Call to Action
scenes.setting: A bedroom with a poster board on the wall. Warm, slightly dim lighting.

panels.panel_visual_description: Character A is speaking to the camera, pointing her fingers and making a fist at the end. She is wearing a black cardigan over a white collared shirt. The background is the same white wall with posters. She covers the camera lens with her hand at the very end. The lighting is warm.

scenes.visual_description: The presenter talks about her internship and a study group. Overlays show a Notion page for the study group and instructions on how to get the links. She ends the video by covering the camera lens with her hand.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character A says: 저도 지금 글로벌 마케팅 인턴으로 근무하면서 [I am also currently working as a global marketing intern and]
Character A says: 영어를 계속 잘해야 하는데요. [I need to keep being good at English.]
Character A says: 지난 영어 스터디 투게더 스픽 1기에 이어서 [Following the last English study Together Speak 1st term,]
Character A says: 지금 2기도 모집 중입니다. [we are currently recruiting for the 2nd term.]
Character A says: 자세한 스터디 진행 방법과 신청 방법이 담긴 [Containing detailed study progress methods and application methods,]
Character A says: 스터디 신청 링크와 [the study application link and]
Character A says: 스픽 최저가 할인 링크, [Speak lowest price discount link,]
Character A says: 인플루언서 한정으로 PDF 2종까지 받을 수 있는 링크들을 [and links to receive up to 2 types of PDFs limited to influencers,]
Character A says: 모두 프로필에 걸어뒀어요. [I have put them all in my profile.]
Character A says: 하실 분들을 위해서 [For those who want to do it,]
Character A says: 댓글로 '스픽' 달아주시면 [if you leave 'Speak' in the comments,]
Character A says: DM으로 바로 보내드리도록 하겠습니다. [I will send it right away via DM.]
Character A says: 다들 올해는 영어를 꼭 해봅시다. [Everyone, let's definitely do English this year.]
Character A says: 파이팅! [Fighting!]
scenes.on_screen_text:
[그래서 무료 영어 스터디를 만듦] ([So I made a free English study])
저도 지금 글로벌 마케팅 인턴으로 근무하면서 영어를 계속 잘해야 함 (당연) (I also need to keep being good at English while working as a global marketing intern (of course))
오늘은 지난 영어 스터디 투게더 스픽 1기에 이어! ([~1/4 일요일 저녁 6시, 선착순 마감!] 지금 2기 모집 중!) (Today, following the last English study Together Speak 1st term! ([~1/4 Sunday 6 PM, first-come-first-served deadline!] Currently recruiting 2nd term!))
자세한 스터디 진행 방법과 신청 방법이 담긴 (Containing detailed study progress methods and application methods)
1. 스터디 신청 바로가기 링크 (1. Study application shortcut link)
2. (신년할인) 스픽 최저가 링크 (2. (New Year discount) Speak lowest price link)
3. (링크 구매 시) 인플루언서 특별 PDF 2종 (3. (When purchasing via link) Influencer special 2 types of PDF)
링크는 모두! 프로필 링크에 걸어두었습니다 :) (All links! are in the profile link :))
or 한번에 편하게 받고 싶으시다면? (or if you want to receive them comfortably at once?)
댓글에 '스픽' 남겨주시면 DM으로 모음집 보내드릴게요! (If you leave 'Speak' in the comments, I'll send you the collection via DM!)
다들 2026 목표에 영어 있으시죠? 파이팅! (Everyone has English in their 2026 goals, right? Fighting!)
